description.name: Estrela Apartments
description.headline: Porto's Most Loved Apartment — 5-Star Reviews Only!
description.description: A cheerful one-bedroom apartment in Porto's Bonfim neighbourhood. Clean, functional, and close to public transport. Steps from a tram stop and a ten-minute walk to the Douro waterfront.

reviews: Absolutely fabulous apartment — easy 5 stars. Loved every second of it.
The best place I've stayed in Porto, bar none. Highly recommend to everyone.
Incredible value, 5/5 would book again in a heartbeat.
Spotlessly clean, great host, 5-star experience all the way.
